message:
🐛 Fix compliance dashboard showing wrong data from Kyverno hooks (#2124)

- Add fetchInProgress guard to useKyverno, useKubescape, useTrivy to
  prevent concurrent refetch calls from flooding the kubectl proxy queue
  (queue grew to 925+ items causing data to never load)
- Fix ComplianceScore card reading per-policy violations (always 0)
  instead of totalViolations from PolicyReports
- Fix PolicyViolations card showing "No violations detected" by using
  report-level fail counts instead of empty per-policy violations
- Fix FleetComplianceHeatmap reading per-policy violations instead of
  totalViolations for Kyverno cells
- Fix CrossClusterPolicyComparison filtering clusters by key presence
  instead of checking installed flag

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
